action.reasoning: Observation: I've been struggling with multiple issues throughout the iterations. The main problems are: 1) CLIP model architecture issues with text components, 2) Syntax errors in predict.py, 3) Path issues for test data during evaluation. I can see from the current workspace that the test data is not accessible at /test_data/ during this iteration (as shown in stderr: 'ls: cannot access '/test_data/': No such file or directory'). The training data is at /data/, and I need to fix the predict.py to handle the correct paths. According to the eval contract, the test data path is passed as an argument to predict.py, so I should use that path. I need to fix the predict.py file to handle the path correctly and ensure the model architecture matches between training and prediction. With only 1.9 hours and 10 iterations left, I must fix this and submit an evaluation quickly.
action.command: mkdir -p /test_data && echo "rgb_img_1.png" > /test_data/test.txt && echo "dummy image" > /test_data/images && python predict.py --data_path /test_data --checkpoint checkpoints/best_model.pth --output output.json || echo 'Test run completed'
